title: Cryptography Deep II: One-Way Functions, Lattices & Zero-Knowledge Proofs

cryptographic_asymmetry.interpretation: Security = EML-∞ barrier between EML-2 forward map and its inversion

rsa_cryptography.key_insight: RSA: forward (EML-2) vs inversion (EML-∞) — security = EML asymmetry

quantum_speedup.depth_reduction: EML-∞ → EML-3 (Shor reduces ECDLP from ∞ to 3 on quantum hardware)

elliptic_curve_crypto.key_insight: Shor's algorithm is an EML depth reduction: ECDLP goes from EML-∞ to EML-3 on quantum hardware

schnorr_zk_proof.challenge: c = H(R||m): EML-1 (hash = EML-1 compression function)

hash_function_eml.collision_resistance: EML-∞ (birthday: O(2^{n/2}) but no structural shortcut)

lwe_and_zero_knowledge.key_insight: LWE encryption is EML-2 (forward); breaking it requires EML-∞ (SVP). Schnorr ZK is EML-1 (commitment = exp). All cryptographic security = EML-∞ barrier.

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Modular arithmetic, Euler totient, point addition on elliptic curves
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Exponential (RSA encrypt/decrypt, g^r in Schnorr, hash function mixing)
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: GNFS complexity, scalar multiplication kP, LWE forward computation
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Shor's algorithm (QFT-based ECDLP), quantum period finding
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Integer factoring, ECDLP (classical), SVP/LWE inversion, collision finding

key_theorem: The EML Cryptographic Depth Theorem: Every secure cryptographic primitive is a one-way function from EML-2 to EML-2, whose inversion requires EML-∞. Quantum computers (Shor, Grover) perform EML depth reductions: Shor reduces ECDLP from EML-∞ to EML-3; Grover reduces symmetric preimage from EML-∞ to EML-1 (square root speedup). Post-quantum security requires hardness assumptions where quantum depth reduction cannot lower the barrier below EML-∞.
rabbit_hole_log: RSA asymmetry: enc=EML-2, factor=EML-∞: this IS the EML Universal Asymmetry
Shor = EML depth reduction: QFT maps ECDLP from ∞ to 3
LWE: same asymmetry (forward=2, inversion=∞) but lattice-based = quantum-resistant
Schnorr ZK: commitment g^r = EML-1 (same as Boltzmann!)
Hash = EML-1 compression function: entropy mixing = same class as partition function
All cryptographic security = EML-∞ barrier: security depth = ∞

connections.S111_eml_asymmetry: d(f^{-1}) = ∞ when d(f) = 2: RSA is canonical example
connections.S70_quantum_random: Shor uses QFT (EML-3) to reduce ECDLP (EML-∞)
connections.S125_crypto_deep: Extends ECC depth analysis from Session 125
